name: merchant_legal_name_present
expression: merchant_legal_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(merchant_legal_name)) > 0
description: merchant_legal_name is required for Merchant Onboarding Application extraction.

name: estimated_monthly_volume_present
expression: estimated_monthly_volume IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(estimated_monthly_volume)) > 0
description: estimated_monthly_volume is required for Merchant Onboarding Application extraction.

name: estimated_monthly_volume_non_negative
description: estimated_monthly_volume should be non-negative when present.

name: average_ticket_amount_non_negative
description: average_ticket_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: high_ticket_amount_non_negative
description: high_ticket_amount should be non-negative when present.
